description: Use this API to delete the specified inter-area transfer from the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = purgatrn(frmarea, toarea, id)

parameters.name: frmarea
parameters.description: One of the areas involved in the transfer. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: toarea
parameters.description: Other area involved in the transfer. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
